title: rosa canina f. fraxinoides
intro: Rosa canina f. fraxinoides, also known as Dog Rose, is a variant of the Rosa canina species, specifically a form with a fraxinoides classification, which is a type of flavonoid glycoside found in the plant. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. fraxinoides include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other menstrual-related issues. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina f. fraxinoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
